test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient for this remediation scope; the existing runtime validation script now verifies env ownership, naming, single-file production Compose topology, long-lived web/api behavior, and the explicit independent --no-deps migration path, and it passed when re-run by the verifier.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Documentation matches the remediated runtime behavior: local-pipeline.md uses the validated --no-deps migrate command, and README.md plus cicd/docs/cicd.md remain aligned with the single-file production Compose and host-managed env model.
commands_run: git --no-pager diff ms1s2r1-implementer-20260331..HEAD -- cicd/docker/compose.prod.yml cicd/tests/run-validations.sh apps/web/Dockerfile apps/api/Dockerfile cicd/docs/local-pipeline.md .env.example apps/web/.env.example apps/api/.env.example
